description_short: Shield your dog bed from dirt, pet hair, and everyday wear and tear with this velvet knitted fabric. Offering the extra protective layer crafted with care!

cover_fabric.composition: Knitted velour fabric with velvet finish (water-resistant)
cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash delicate cycle, cold water. No bleach/softeners. Air-dry.

faq_specs.question: Is the SleepyCat orthopedic dog bed cover water-resistant?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, this orthopedic dog bed cover is water-resistant, helping guard against minor spills, drool, and accidents.

notes_observed: Replacement cover for [[orthopedic-dog-bed]]. Only Large + XL (no Medium) — Medium ortho bed users would use original-style cover sized similarly. Water-resistant differentiates from non-ortho cover.
